title: Eighth Notes & Subdivisions
description: Break the beat in half. Learn to read and perform pairs of eighth notes and eighth rests.

sessions.title: One And Two And
sessions.description: Learn what eighth notes are and how to count them.
sessions.prompt: Introduce the concept of eighth notes. Explain how to count them as '1 and 2 and 3 and 4 and'. Create a simple rhythm reading exercise using only the Middle C note that mixes quarter notes and pairs of eighth notes.

sessions.title: The Quick Break
sessions.description: Learn what eighth rests look like and how to perform them.
sessions.prompt: Introduce the eighth rest symbol. Provide an exercise in 4/4 time combining quarter notes, beamed eighth notes, and off-beat eighth notes (an eighth rest followed by an eighth note) on Middle C.

levels.criteria: Can accurately count and perform '1 and 2 and' rhythms.
